title: Early Elytra
description: Got places to go? No time to go through the end? Now you can craft it.
body:
Easily craftable with 2 feathers, 1 string, 4 phantom membranes and 1 amethyst shard.

I wasn't fond of the existing mods/datapacks that added the craftable elytra, so I made one my self.

![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/sVgW22C3/images/642931cf04eddfe0b71d2872581dc0ad24aba6b8.png)

See [my other mods](https://modrinth.com/user/Pepsied)
